imprintPage.title: Imprint
imprintPage.body: Legal information and company details in accordance with German Telemedia Act (TMG).
imprintPage.address: Rr. Qemal Stafa P.17 AP.1, AL-1005 Tirana, Albania
imprintPage.liabilityContentBody: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own website content in accordance with applicable German law. We are not obligated to monitor third-party information or investigate potential illegal activity unless we become aware of a specific legal violation. If such a violation is identified, the content will be removed immediately.
imprintPage.liabilityLinksBody: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We have no control over the content of these websites and therefore cannot accept responsibility for their content. If we become aware of any legal violations on linked websites, the relevant links will be removed promptly.
imprintPage.copyrightBody: All content, text, images, and materials published on this website are protected by German copyright law. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use without prior written permission is prohibited. If you believe any content infringes copyright, please contact us so we can investigate and take appropriate action.

toursPage.title: Find Your Perfect Cycling Adventure
toursPage.body: From coastal rides to mountain adventures, explore our carefully designed cycling holidays across Albania.

hero.body: Explore Albania's breathtaking mountains, scenic coastlines, and historic villages through expertly guided cycling tours designed for unforgettable adventures.

about.label: About Us
about.quote: “At Albanien Radreisen, we believe the best way to experience Albania is on two wheels. Our expertly guided cycling tours take you through breathtaking landscapes, historic towns, and authentic local communities, creating unforgettable adventures with comfort, safety, and local expertise”

whyChooseUs.lead: From expertly planned routes to local guides, we create authentic cycling experiences that let you discover Albania safely, comfortably, and at your own pace.

steps.title: Choose Your Tour
steps.description: Browse our collection of guided cycling tours and select the route that best matches your interests, fitness level, and travel dates.

steps.title: Complete Your Booking
steps.description: Reserve your spot by submitting your booking details. We'll take care of the planning, accommodation, and tour arrangements.

steps.title: Confirm Availability
steps.description: Get in touch with us to check tour availability. We'll answer your questions and help you choose the perfect departure date.

faq.label: FAQ's
faq.title: Answers You Need, Anytime You Ask

items.question: Do I need previous cycling experience?
items.answer: No. Our tours welcome riders of all levels, and our guides adapt the pace and support to match your experience.

items.question: Are bikes included in the tour package?
items.answer: Yes. High-quality touring bikes are included, along with helmets and basic repair support on the road.

items.question: What should I bring for the tour?
items.answer: Pack comfortable cycling clothing, sunscreen, a refillable water bottle, and any personal items you need for a multi-day ride.

items.question: Are the tours suitable for beginners?
items.answer: Yes. Our tours are designed for all experience levels, from beginners to experienced cyclists, with expert guidance throughout the journey.

items.question: Can I book a private cycling tour?
items.answer: Absolutely. We can arrange private departures for groups, families, or custom dates depending on availability.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Loved By Travelers Like You
testimonials.body: Hear directly from our travelers — their stories, in their own words, on video.

items.quote: The routes were breathtaking, the organization was excellent, and our guide made every day unforgettable. Albania completely exceeded our expectations.
items.name: Sarah Mitchell

items.quote: Every detail was taken care of. The scenery, the food, the people — riding through Albania felt like discovering a country most tourists never see.
items.name: James Carter

items.quote: Our guide's local knowledge turned every stop into a story. This was hands down the best cycling trip our group has ever taken.
items.name: Elena Rossi

items.quote: From the mountain descents to the coastal villages, everything was paced perfectly for our group. We're already planning our next trip back.
items.name: Marco Alves

cta.title: Ready to Explore Albania on Two Wheels?
cta.body: Join us for an unforgettable cycling adventure through breathtaking landscapes, charming villages, and historic routes—guided by local experts every step of the way.

tourPage.title: 8-Day Cycling & Discovery Tour Through Albania (2026)
tourPage.aboutBody: Experience the hidden gem of the Balkans on two wheels. This 8-day tour takes you through Albania's most breathtaking landscapes, from the rugged mountains of the north to the pristine Riviera coast. Ride through ancient villages, taste local cuisine, and connect with Albania's rich history and culture — all guided by our expert local team.
highlights: Cycle through the UNESCO-listed city of Berat
Ride along the stunning Albanian Riviera coastline
Visit the ancient ruins of Butrint National Park
Experience the traditional mountain villages of the Accursed Mountains
Taste authentic Albanian cuisine at local family restaurants
Professional support vehicle throughout the journey

itinerary.title: Arrival in Tirana
itinerary.body: Welcome dinner and briefing. Explore the colorful bazaars and settle into your hotel.

itinerary.title: Tirana to Kruja
itinerary.body: Ride to historic Kruja with castle views and a visit to the traditional bazaar.

itinerary.title: Lake Komani & Valbona
itinerary.body: Scenic ferry crossing on Lake Komani, then continue into the Valbona valley.

itinerary.title: Valbona Valley Ride
itinerary.body: Cycle through alpine scenery and remote mountain villages in Valbona.

itinerary.title: Valbona to Theth
itinerary.body: Cross the mountain pass into Theth with dramatic peaks and local guesthouses.

itinerary.title: Descent to Berat
itinerary.body: Transfer south and ride into the UNESCO city of Berat, the city of a thousand windows.

itinerary.title: Berat to Gjirokastër
itinerary.body: Coastal and highland riding toward the stone city of Gjirokastër.

itinerary.title: Butrint & Departure
itinerary.body: Visit Butrint National Park, then transfer to the airport for departure.

included: Entry fees to national parks and monuments

aboutIntro.label: Featured Tours
aboutIntro.title: About Tarko Albanian
aboutIntro.paragraph1: Welcome to Albania Travel — your source for unforgettable experiences in Albania. We combine modern comfort with breathtaking landscapes and professional assistance to make your trip a special adventure.
aboutIntro.paragraph2: With years of experience, local knowledge and a dedicated team we create tailor-made tours to fit your needs. From cultural and historical tours to cycling trips and hiking — we handle every detail so you can focus on the journey.

team.label: Our People
team.title: Meet the Team
team.body: Our passionate team of cycling guides and travel professionals is dedicated to making every journey safe, enjoyable, and unforgettable.

footer.description: Creating unforgettable cycling adventures across Albania with expertly guided tours and authentic travel experiences.
